main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'propylene glycol... partial membrane wetting loss' matches no-wetting + PG anchors

key_signals.justification: C2: cites 6 signals (caudal 36%, cond 480, dP low, mejora 36->78%, PG 20%, rechazo)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (bisulfito oxidation, freeze-thaw damage) but freeze not deeply justified

recommended_action.justification: C4: continues low-P circulation but suggests citric acid CIP at 20 bar if stalls

requested_data.justification: C5: only 1 anchor (viscosity), no fabricante consult, no propilenglicol residual analysis

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit thresholds: cond >450, caudal <85% after 72h, dP >1.5 bar -> shift

reviewer_notes: Claude conflict of interest; CIP suggestion is conditional not immediate
